2136650.name: Catto Pew Pew - Hatto's for Catto's Cosmetic Pack
2136650.description:
20 New Hatto's for your Catto!


Are you sick and tired of your virtual cat-character-thing of being bald?

Do you want your cat to look stylish and snazzy?

Do you, for some reason, feel the need to spend a fraction of your hard-earned money on a bunch of virtual hats?

If so, you are in the purrfect place!

The 20 New Fabulous Hatto's for your very own Catto are as follows:


- Bub Ross
- Full Meowtal Jacket
- Red Mogus Man
- Blue Mogus Man
- Meowiachi Uno
- Meowiachi Dos
- Meowiachi Tres
- Mister Cardboard
- Al' Capwnd
- Hehehe
- Uncool Wallet
- Super Meowio
- Red Reddit Neckbeardo
- Blue Reddit Neckbeardo
- Conehead
- Burger
- Generic Bowl of Fruit
- Lil' Bro
- Oui Oui
- Sharky
2136650.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
